text:
この訓練は一人専用で最高難易度！
つまり非常に危険というわけです！
ですので、アドバイスを送りますね！

ここは、重たい一撃を放つ敵だらけ！
あたったら痛いですよー！
しっかり動きを見極めましょうね

In this training, you'll be challenging the
hardest difficulty alone! It's super dangerous,
so let me give you some tips and tricks.

This place is crawling with enemies that all
use heavy attacks! You'd better stay on your
toes and anticipate their moves!
